title: Status Dropdown Filter for Reports and Dashboards
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to filter reports and dashboards by their Status attribute, so that I can quickly view only items in a specific status.
description: Adds a Status dropdown filter to the left sidebar filter pane on the Reports and Dashboards page. The dropdown populates with the available status values from the report/dashboard records and filters the data table when a status is selected.
acceptance_criteria: Status dropdown filter is visible in the left sidebar filter pane
Dropdown populates with available status values from the data
Selecting a status filters the data table to show only matching records
Status filter works in combination with other sidebar filters
ux_changes: Added a Status dropdown filter to the left sidebar on the Reports and Dashboards page.
implementation_notes: Status dropdown was added alongside existing filters in the left sidebar pane. Confirmed working on staging.
comment_summary: Balaji added the status dropdown and shared a screenshot. Confirmed working on staging.
